name: IdsDmMbrshDmMbrLmtExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, YR_NO, PROD_ACCUM_ID, ACCUM_NO, BNF_SUM_DTL_NTWK_TYP_CD, BNF_SUM_DTL_NTWK_TYP_NM, BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD, BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_NM, LMT_AMT, BLUEKC_DPLY_IN, MBR_360_DPLY_IN, EXTRNL_DPLY_ACCUM_DESC, INTRNL_DPLY_ACCUM_DESC, CONVERT(datetime, CONVERT(char(10), PLN_YR_EFF_DT, 120) + ' 00:00:00.000', 120) AS PLN_YR_EFF_DT, CONVERT(datetime, CONVERT(char(10), PLN_YR_END_DT, 120) + ' 00:00:00.000', 120) AS PLN_YR_END_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_MBR_LMT) SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, YR_NO, PROD_ACCUM_ID, ACCUM_NO, BNF_SUM_DTL_NTWK_TYP_CD, BNF_SUM_DTL_NTWK_TYP_NM, BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD, BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_NM, LMT_AMT, BLUEKC_DPLY_IN, MBR_360_DPLY_IN, EXTRNL_DPLY_ACCUM_DESC, INTRNL_DPLY_ACCUM_DESC, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO, PLN_YR_EFF_DT, PLN_YR_END_DT FROM cte1
